texto: I will tell you something my father once told me. The difference between a brave man and a coward is very simple. It is a problem of love. A coward loves only himself … The brave man loves other men first and himself last. (From Meyer's The Son)
explicacao: Citação de Phillipp Meyer sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “I will tell you something my father once told me. The difference between a brave man and a coward…” articula coragem, bravery, brave em registro de coragem, com relevância para contextos como coragem.
